controls.summary: Risk management system — continuous, iterative risk identification and mitigation.
Data governance — training/validation data is relevant, representative, and bias-checked.
evidence: DPIA artifact for any PII handling.

controls.summary: Technical documentation — system architecture, components, training procedures documented.
Record-keeping — automatic logging of system events for traceability.
Transparency — instructions for use enable users to interpret the system's output correctly.
evidence: why-fired annotation surfaces detection provenance on every finding.

controls.summary: Human oversight — system permits humans to override / interrupt.
evidence: Bodyguard hook can refuse risky edits.

controls.summary: Accuracy, robustness, cybersecurity — appropriate level of accuracy and resilience.
